name: S'mores Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. Unroll dough into 2 long rectangles and place them on an ungreased 13x9" pan, pressing the dough over the bottom and sealing all perforations well.
3. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the dough.
4. Place marshmallow halves (cut-side-down) over the chips in five rows of four.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow to cool for about 15 minutes before cutting into squares around the marshmallows.
Makes 20 bars. TIP: For ease in cutting marshmallows, use kitchen scissors dipped in warm water.
